title: Mini Blocks
description: Add survival-friendly mini blocks to Minecraft!
body:
This plugin adds survival-friendly "Mini Blocks" to Minecraft!

# Features
- 600+ craftable mini blocks
- Survival friendly recipes
- Creative friendly commands
- Configurable textures and recipes
- Full alphabet, numbers, arrows, and symbols
- Auto rotating sideways blocks (e.g. logs)
- Mini grass and leaves match biome color

# Commands and Permissions
| Command   | Description                         | Permission          | Default  |
|-----------|-------------------------------------|---------------------|----------|
| /mbshrink | Shrinks the block you're holding    | `miniblocks.shrink` | OP       |
| /mbgrow   | Grows the miniblock you're holding  | `miniblocks.grow`   | OP       |
| /mbgive   | Give yourself a Mini Block          | `miniblocks.give`   | OP       |
|           | Allows you to craft Mini Blocks     | `miniblocks.craft`  | everyone |

# Usage and Recipes
## Blocks
To get started, first craft the "Mini Blank" block. This will be the base of all Mini Blocks.
![Mini Blank Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/HpHrgql.png)

Then, simply combine this with almost any block (and some items) to create a mini version!
![Mini Block Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/029tNGw.png)
## Letters/Symbols
These are crafted using wood planks and slabs.
### Letters
![Alphabet Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/uRbAzYh.png)
### Numbers
![Number Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/dPTReZC.png)
### Symbols

### Arrows
